name: PDF Tools
description: Browser-based tools to merge, split, convert, compress, and edit PDF files.

tools.name: Merge PDF
tools.description: Combine multiple PDF files into one document in any order.

tools.name: Split PDF
tools.description: Separate a PDF into multiple files by page ranges.

tools.name: Compress PDF
tools.description: Reduce PDF file size while preserving readable quality.

tools.name: Rotate PDF
tools.description: Rotate one or all pages of a PDF and save permanently.

tools.name: Delete PDF Pages
tools.description: Remove selected pages from a PDF document.

tools.name: Extract PDF Pages
tools.description: Pull selected pages out into a new PDF file.

tools.name: Organize PDF
tools.description: Reorder, rearrange, and sort PDF pages by drag and drop.

tools.name: JPG to PDF
tools.description: Convert JPG and other images into a single PDF.

tools.name: PNG to PDF
tools.description: Turn one or more PNG images into a PDF document.

tools.name: PDF to JPG
tools.description: Convert each PDF page into a downloadable JPG image.

tools.name: PDF to PNG
tools.description: Render PDF pages as high-quality PNG images.

tools.name: Images to PDF
tools.description: Batch combine multiple images into one ordered PDF.

tools.name: Extract Images from PDF
tools.description: Pull all embedded images out of a PDF file.

tools.name: Add Page Numbers to PDF
tools.description: Insert customizable page numbers into a PDF.

tools.name: Add Watermark to PDF
tools.description: Stamp text or image watermarks across PDF pages.

tools.name: Crop PDF
tools.description: Trim margins and crop the visible area of PDF pages.

tools.name: Protect PDF
tools.description: Add a password and encryption to lock a PDF.

tools.name: Unlock PDF
tools.description: Remove a known password from a PDF file.

tools.name: Sign PDF
tools.description: Draw, type, or upload a signature onto a PDF.

tools.name: Edit PDF
tools.description: Add text, images, shapes, and annotations to a PDF.

tools.name: Fill PDF Form
tools.description: Fill in and flatten interactive PDF form fields.

tools.name: Flatten PDF
tools.description: Merge annotations and form fields into static content.

tools.name: Resize PDF
tools.description: Scale PDF pages to A4, Letter, or custom dimensions.

tools.name: Reverse PDF Pages
tools.description: Flip the page order of a PDF document.

tools.name: Split PDF in Half
tools.description: Cut each PDF page vertically or horizontally into two.

tools.name: Extract Text from PDF
tools.description: Copy all selectable text out of a PDF as plain text.

tools.name: PDF Page Counter
tools.description: Instantly count the number of pages in a PDF.

tools.name: Duplicate PDF Pages
tools.description: Copy and repeat selected pages within a PDF.

tools.name: PDF to Word
tools.description: Convert a PDF into an editable DOC/DOCX document.

tools.name: Word to PDF
tools.description: Convert DOC/DOCX documents into PDF files.

tools.name: TXT to PDF
tools.description: Convert plain text files into a formatted PDF document.

tools.name: CSV to PDF
tools.description: Turn CSV spreadsheet data into a readable PDF.

tools.name: Excel to PDF
tools.description: Convert CSV exports from Excel into PDF files.

tools.name: PDF to Excel
tools.description: Extract PDF table data and download as CSV for Excel.

tools.name: EPUB to PDF
tools.description: Convert EPUB ebooks to PDF for printing or sharing.

tools.name: CBZ to PDF
tools.description: Convert CBZ comic archives to a single PDF.

tools.name: PDF to CBZ
tools.description: Convert PDF pages into a CBZ comic archive.

tools.name: PDF to PDF/A
tools.description: Prepare PDFs for long-term archival (PDF/A style export).

tools.name: Bank Statement to Excel
tools.description: Extract bank statement PDF data to CSV for Excel.
